mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, subtotal, selected_color, selected_size) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal}, #{selectedColor}, #{selectedSize})

INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, subtotal, selected_color, selected_size) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.selectedColor}, #{item.selectedSize})
